name: DatePicker
description: Fully functional date/range pickers built from DayLabel, DayCell, DateSelector, and PeriodRangeItem. DatePicker is a single-month calendar with Cancel/Apply footer; DateRangePicker adds a preset sidebar and two side-by-side months with click-to-select range logic.
sourceNote: Real month-grid generation (Monday-first weeks, leap-year-correct) lives in dateUtils.ts. DatePicker/DateRangePicker reuse this project's existing CompactButton (month-nav arrows) and Button (footer actions) components rather than re-implementing them.

onChange.type: (start: Date | null, end: Date | null) => void

presets.default: ['Today','Last 7 days','Last 30 days','Last 3 months','Last 12 months','Month to date','Year to date','All time']
